v': Val.value
h1: heap
H0: h1 = Fmap.single loc0 v'
rho2: rho
H1: trace_model rho2 emp
H11: Fmap.indom h1 loc0
(loc0 ~~> v) (Fmap.single loc0 v)
loc0: loc
v: val
v': Val.value
h1: heap
H0: (loc0 ~~> v') h1
rho2: rho
H1: trace_model rho2 emp
H11: Fmap.indom h1 loc0
vunit = vunit
loc0: loc
v: val
v': Val.value
h1: heap
H0: (loc0 ~~> v') h1
rho2: rho
H1: trace_model rho2 emp
H11: Fmap.indom h1 loc0
trace_model rho2 emp /\
futureCondEntail (fc_singleton trace_default)
  (fc_singleton trace_default)

  
Fmap.indom_single:
  forall [A B : Type] (x : A) (v : B),
  Fmap.indom (Fmap.single x v) x
indom_single:
  forall [A B : Type] (x : A) (v : B),
  indom (single x v) x
H0: h1 = Fmap.single loc0 v'
hsingle_intro:
  forall (p : loc) (v : Val.value),
  (p ~~> v) (Fmap.single p v)
Fmap.disjoint_single_single_same_inv:
  forall [A B : Type] [x : A] [v1 v2 : B],
  Fmap.disjoint (Fmap.single x v1) (Fmap.single x v2) ->
  False
disjoint_single_single_same_inv:
  forall [A B : Type] [x : A] [v1 v2 : B],
  disjoint (single x v1) (single x v2) -> False
Fmap.indom_single_eq:
  forall [A B : Type] (x y : A) (v : B),
  Fmap.indom (Fmap.single x v) y = (x = y)
indom_single_eq:
  forall [A B : Type] (x y : A) (v : B),
  indom (single x v) y = (x = y)
Fmap.read_single:
  forall [A B : Type] {IB : Inhab B} (x : A) (v : B),
  Fmap.read (Fmap.single x v) x = v
hsingle_inv:
  forall [p : loc] [v : Val.value] [h : heap],
  (p ~~> v) h -> h = Fmap.single p v
read_single:
  forall [A B : Type] {IB : Inhab B} (x : A) (v : B),
  read (single x v) x = v
fmap_not_indom_of_neq:
  forall (A B : Type) (a b : A) (v : B),
  a <> b -> ~ Fmap.indom (Fmap.single a v) b
Fmap.remove_single:
  forall [A B : Type] (x : A) (v : B),
  Fmap.remove (Fmap.single x v) x = Fmap.empty
remove_single:
  forall [A B : Type] (x : A) (v : B),
  remove (single x v) x = empty
Fmap.update_empty:
  forall [A B : Type] (x : A) (v : B),
  Fmap.update Fmap.empty x v = Fmap.single x v
update_empty:
  forall [A B : Type] (x : A) (v : B),
  update empty x v = single x v
Fmap.update_single:
  forall [A B : Type] (x : A) (v w : B),
  Fmap.update (Fmap.single x v) x w = Fmap.single x w
update_single:
  forall [A B : Type] (x : A) (v w : B),
  update (single x v) x w = single x w
disjoint_single_set:
  forall [A B : Type] [h : fmap A B] 
    [l : A] [v1 : B] (v2 : B),
  disjoint (single l v1) h -> disjoint (single l v2) h
Fmap.disjoint_single_set:
  forall [A B : Type] [h : Fmap.fmap A B] 
    [l : A] [v1 : B] (v2 : B),
  Fmap.disjoint (Fmap.single l v1) h ->
  Fmap.disjoint (Fmap.single l v2) h
disjoint_single_of_not_indom:
  forall [A B : Type] [h : fmap A B] [x : A] (v : B),
  ~ indom h x -> disjoint (single x v) h
Fmap.disjoint_single_single:
  forall [A B : Type] [x1 x2 : A] (v1 v2 : B),
  x1 <> x2 ->
  Fmap.disjoint (Fmap.single x1 v1)
    (Fmap.single x2 v2)
Fmap.disjoint_single_of_not_indom:
  forall [A B : Type] [h : Fmap.fmap A B] 
    [x : A] (v : B),
  ~ Fmap.indom h x ->
  Fmap.disjoint (Fmap.single x v) h
disjoint_single_single:
  forall [A B : Type] [x1 x2 : A] (v1 v2 : B),
  x1 <> x2 -> disjoint (single x1 v1) (single x2 v2)
Fmap.update_eq_union_single:
  forall [A B : Type] (h : Fmap.fmap A B) 
    (x : A) (v : B),
  Fmap.update h x v = Fmap.single x v \u h
update_eq_union_single:
  forall [A B : Type] (h : fmap A B) (x : A) (v : B),
  update h x v = single x v \u h
single_fresh:
  forall [B : Type] (null : nat) 
    (h : fmap nat B) (v : B),
  exists l : nat, disjoint (single l v) h /\ l <> null
Fmap.single_fresh:
  forall [B : Type] (null : nat) 
    (h : Fmap.fmap nat B) 
    (v : B),
  exists l : nat,
    Fmap.disjoint (Fmap.single l v) h /\ l <> null
Fmap.remove_union_single_l:
  forall [A B : Type] [h : Fmap.fmap A B] 
    [x : A] (v : B),
  ~ Fmap.indom h x ->
  Fmap.remove (Fmap.single x v \u h) x = h
remove_union_single_l:
  forall [A B : Type] [h : fmap A B] [x : A] (v : B),
  ~ indom h x -> remove (single x v \u h) x = h
Fmap.conseq_cons:
  forall [B : Type] (l : nat) (v : B) (vs : list B),
  Fmap.conseq (v :: vs) l =
  Fmap.single l v \u Fmap.conseq vs (S l)
conseq_cons:
  forall [B : Type] (l : nat) (v : B) (vs : list B),
  conseq (v :: vs) l = single l v \u conseq vs (S l)
Fmap.disjoint_single_conseq:
  forall [B : Type] [l l' : nat] (L : list B) (v : B),
  (l < l')%nat \/ (l >= l' + length L)%nat ->
  Fmap.disjoint (Fmap.single l v) (Fmap.conseq L l')
disjoint_single_conseq:
  forall [B : Type] [l l' : nat] (L : list B) (v : B),
  (l < l')%nat \/ (l >= l' + length L)%nat ->
  disjoint (single l v) (conseq L l')
Fmap.conseq_cons':
  forall [B : Type] (l : nat) (v : B) (vs : list B),
  Fmap.conseq (v :: vs) l =
  Fmap.single l v \u Fmap.conseq vs (l + 1)
conseq_cons':
  forall [B : Type] (l : nat) (v : B) (vs : list B),
  conseq (v :: vs) l = single l v \u conseq vs (l + 1)
loc0: loc
v: val
v': Val.value
h1: heap
H0: h1 = Fmap.single loc0 v'
rho2: rho
H1: trace_model rho2 emp
H11: Fmap.indom h1 loc0
(loc0 ~~> v) (Fmap.single loc0 v)

H0: (loc0 ~~> v') h1

loc0: loc

loc0: loc
v: val
v': Val.value
h1: heap
H0: (loc0 ~~> v') h1
rho2: rho
H1: trace_model rho2 emp
H11: Fmap.indom h1 loc0
futureCondEntail (fc_singleton trace_default)
  (fc_singleton trace_default)
 
  apply futureCondEntail_exact.

  
P: hprop
f1: futureCond
forall h1 : heap,
P h1 ->
forall (v : val) (h2 : heap) (rho1 : rho),
trace_model rho1 emp ->
forall (rho2 : rho) (f3 : futureCond),
bigstep h1 rho1 (fc_singleton trace_default)
  (passume f1) h2 rho2 f3 v ->
(P \* \[v = vunit]) h2 /\
trace_model rho2 emp /\ futureCondEntail f1 f3

  
P: hprop
f1: futureCond
h1: heap
H0: P h1
v: val
h2: heap
rho1: rho
H1: trace_model rho1 emp
rho2: rho
f3: futureCond
H2: bigstep h1 rho1 (fc_singleton trace_default)
  (passume f1) h2 rho2 f3 v
(P \* \[v = vunit]) h2 /\
trace_model rho2 emp /\ futureCondEntail f1 f3

  
P: hprop
f1: futureCond
h1: heap
H0: P h1
v: val
h2: heap
rho1: rho
H1: trace_model rho1 emp
rho2: rho
f3: futureCond
forall (h : heap) (r : rho) (f f_assume : futureCond),
h = h1 ->
r = rho1 ->
f = fc_singleton trace_default ->
f_assume = f1 ->
h1 = h2 ->
rho1 = rho2 ->
fc_conj (fc_singleton trace_default) f1 = f3 ->
vunit = v ->
(P \* \[vunit = vunit]) h2 /\
trace_model rho2 emp /\
futureCondEntail f1
  (fc_conj (fc_singleton trace_default) f1)

  
P: hprop
f1: futureCond
h1: heap
H0: P h1
v: val
h2: heap
rho1: rho
H1: trace_model rho1 emp
rho2: rho
f3: futureCond
h: heap
r: rho
f, f_assume: futureCond
H: h = h1
H3: r = rho1
H4: f = fc_singleton trace_default
H6: f_assume = f1
H5: h1 = h2
H7: rho1 = rho2
H8: fc_conj (fc_singleton trace_default) f1 = f3
H9: vunit = v
(P \* \[vunit = vunit]) h2 /\
trace_model rho2 emp /\
futureCondEntail f1
  (fc_conj (fc_singleton trace_default) f1)

  (fc_conj (fc_singleton trace_default) f1)

fromal_arg: var
e: expr
actual_arg: val
P: hprop
Q: val -> hprop
t: theta
f: futureCond
H: forward P emp (fc_singleton trace_default)
  (subst fromal_arg actual_arg e) Q t f
IHforward: forall h1 : heap,
P h1 ->
forall (v : val) (h2 : heap) (rho1 : rho),
trace_model rho1 emp ->
forall (rho2 : rho) (f3 : futureCond),
bigstep h1 rho1
  (fc_singleton trace_default)
  (subst fromal_arg actual_arg e) h2 rho2
  f3 v ->
Q v h2 /\
trace_model rho2 t /\
futureCondEntail f f3
forall h1 : heap,
P h1 ->
forall (v : val) (h2 : heap) (rho1 : rho),
trace_model rho1 emp ->
forall (rho2 : rho) (f3 : futureCond),
bigstep h1 rho1 (fc_singleton trace_default)
  (papp (pval (vfun fromal_arg e)) (pval actual_arg))
  h2 rho2 f3 v ->
Q v h2 /\ trace_model rho2 t /\ futureCondEntail f f3

e: expr
actual_arg: val
P: hprop
Q: val -> hprop
t: theta
f: futureCond
H: forward P emp (fc_singleton trace_default)
  (subst fromal_arg actual_arg e) Q t f
IHforward: forall h1 : heap,
P h1 ->
forall (v : val) (h2 : heap) (rho1 : rho),
trace_model rho1 emp ->
forall (rho2 : rho) (f3 : futureCond),
bigstep h1 rho1
  (fc_singleton trace_default)
  (subst fromal_arg actual_arg e) h2 rho2
  f3 v ->
Q v h2 /\
trace_model rho2 t /\
futureCondEntail f f3

H0: P h1

h2: heap
rho1: rho
H1: trace_model rho1 emp

H2: bigstep h1 rho1 (fc_singleton trace_default)
  (papp (pval (vfun fromal_arg e))
     (pval actual_arg)) h2 rho2 f3 v
Q v h2 /\ trace_model rho2 t /\ futureCondEntail f f3

IHforward: forall h1 : heap,
P h1 ->
forall (v : val) (h2 : heap) (rho1 : rho),
trace_model rho1 emp ->
forall (rho2 : rho) (f3 : futureCond),
bigstep h1 rho1

h1: heap
H0: P h1
v: val
h2: heap
rho1: rho
H1: trace_model rho1 emp
rho2: rho
f3: futureCond
forall (fromal_arg0 : var) 
  (e0 : expr) (actual_arg0 : val) 
  (h0 h3 : heap) (rho0 rho3 : rho)
  (f1 f2 : futureCond) 
  (v0 : val),
bigstep h1 rho1 (fc_singleton trace_default)
  (subst fromal_arg actual_arg e) h2 rho2 f3 v ->
h0 = h1 ->
rho0 = rho1 ->
f1 = fc_singleton trace_default ->
fromal_arg0 = fromal_arg ->
e0 = e ->
actual_arg0 = actual_arg ->
h3 = h2 ->
rho3 = rho2 ->
f2 = f3 ->
v0 = v ->
Q v h2 /\ trace_model rho2 t /\ futureCondEntail f f3

rho1: rho

H13: bigstep h1 rho1 (fc_singleton trace_default)
  (subst fromal_arg actual_arg e) h2 rho2 f3 v
trace_model rho2 t /\ futureCondEntail f f3

  (subst fromal_arg actual_arg e) h2 rho2 f3 v

P: hprop
Q: val -> hprop
t: theta
f, f_ctx: futureCond
t_ctx: theta
f_ctx': futureCond
e: expr
H: forward P emp (fc_singleton trace_default) e Q t f
H0: futureSubtraction f_ctx t f_ctx'
IHforward: forall h1 : heap,
P h1 ->
forall (v : val) (h2 : heap) (rho1 : rho),
trace_model rho1 emp ->
forall (rho2 : rho) (f3 : futureCond),
bigstep h1 rho1
  (fc_singleton trace_default) e h2 rho2
  f3 v ->
Q v h2 /\
trace_model rho2 t /\
futureCondEntail f f3
forall h1 : heap,
P h1 ->
forall (v : val) (h2 : heap) (rho1 : rho),
trace_model rho1 t_ctx ->
forall (rho2 : rho) (f3 : futureCond),
bigstep h1 rho1 f_ctx e h2 rho2 f3 v ->
Q v h2 /\
trace_model rho2 (seq t_ctx t) /\
futureCondEntail (fc_conj f_ctx' f) f3
 
  
P: hprop
Q: val -> hprop
t: theta
f, f_ctx: futureCond
t_ctx: theta
f_ctx': futureCond
e: expr
H: forward P emp (fc_singleton trace_default) e Q t f
H0: futureSubtraction f_ctx t f_ctx'
IHforward: forall h1 : heap,
P h1 ->
forall (v : val) (h2 : heap) (rho1 : rho),
trace_model rho1 emp ->
forall (rho2 : rho) (f3 : futureCond),
bigstep h1 rho1
  (fc_singleton trace_default) e h2 rho2
  f3 v ->
Q v h2 /\
trace_model rho2 t /\
futureCondEntail f f3
h1: heap
H1: P h1
v: val
h2: heap
rho1: rho
H2: trace_model rho1 t_ctx
rho2: rho
f3: futureCond
H3: bigstep h1 rho1 f_ctx e h2 rho2 f3 v

P: hprop
Q: val -> hprop
t: theta
f, f_ctx: futureCond
t_ctx: theta
f_ctx': futureCond
e: expr
H: forward P emp (fc_singleton trace_default) e Q t f
H0: futureSubtraction f_ctx t f_ctx'
IHforward: forall h1 : heap,
P h1 ->
forall (v : val) (h2 : heap) (rho1 : rho),
trace_model rho1 emp ->
forall (rho2 : rho) (f3 : futureCond),
bigstep h1 rho1
  (fc_singleton trace_default) e h2 rho2
  f3 v ->
Q v h2 /\
trace_model rho2 t /\
futureCondEntail f f3
h1: heap
H1: P h1
v: val
h2: heap
rho1: rho
H2: trace_model rho1 t_ctx
rho2: rho
f3: futureCond
H3: bigstep h1 rho1 f_ctx e h2 rho2 f3 v
H4: forall (P : hprop) (e : expr) 
  (Q : val -> hprop) (t : theta) 
  (f : futureCond) (h1 : heap) 
  (rho1 : rho) (f1 : futureCond) 
  (h2 : heap) (rho2 : rho) 
  (f2 : futureCond) (v : val),
forward P emp (fc_singleton trace_default) e Q t
  f ->
bigstep h1 rho1 f1 e h2 rho2 f2 v ->
exists (rho3 : rho) (f3 : futureCond),
  bigstep h1 nil (fc_singleton trace_default) e
    h2 rho3 f3 v /\
  rho2 = rho1 ++ rho3 /\
  futureCondEntail f f3 /\ futureCondEntail f2 f3
Q v h2 /\
trace_model rho2 (seq t_ctx t) /\
futureCondEntail (fc_conj f_ctx' f) f3

H4: exists (rho3 : rho) (f4 : futureCond),
  bigstep h1 nil (fc_singleton trace_default) e
    h2 rho3 f4 v /\
  rho2 = rho1 ++ rho3 /\
  futureCondEntail f f4 /\ futureCondEntail f3 f4
Q v h2 /\
trace_model rho2 (seq t_ctx t) /\
futureCondEntail (fc_conj f_ctx' f) f3

H5: bigstep h1 nil (fc_singleton trace_default) e h2
  rho3 f0 v
H6: futureCondEntail f f0
H8: futureCondEntail f3 f0
H4: forall (h1 : heap) (rho1 : rho)
  (f_ctx : futureCond) 
  (e : expr) (h2 : heap) 
  (rho2 : rho) (f3 : futureCond) 
  (v : val) (rho3 : rho) 
  (f0 f_ctx' : futureCond),
bigstep h1 rho1 f_ctx e h2 rho2 f3 v ->
bigstep h1 nil (fc_singleton trace_default) e h2
  rho3 f0 v ->
futureSubtraction_linear f_ctx rho3 f_ctx' /\
f3 = fc_conj f_ctx' f0
futureCondEntail (fc_conj f_ctx' f) f3

  
P: hprop
Q: val -> hprop
t: theta
f, f_ctx: futureCond
t_ctx: theta
f_ctx': futureCond
e: expr
H: forward P emp (fc_singleton trace_default) e Q t f
H0: futureSubtraction f_ctx t f_ctx'
v: val
h2: heap
rho3: rho
f0: futureCond
H7: Q v h2
H10: trace_model rho3 t
H11: futureCondEntail f f0
h1: heap
H1: P h1
rho1: rho
H2: trace_model rho1 t_ctx
f3: futureCond
H3: bigstep h1 rho1 f_ctx e h2 (rho1 ++ rho3) f3 v
H5: bigstep h1 nil (fc_singleton trace_default) e h2
  rho3 f0 v
H6: futureCondEntail f f0
H8: futureCondEntail f3 f0
H4: futureSubtraction_linear f_ctx rho3 f_ctx' /\
f3 = fc_conj f_ctx' f0
futureCondEntail (fc_conj f_ctx' f) f3

Q: val -> hprop
t: theta
f, f_ctx: futureCond

H7: Q v h2
H10: trace_model rho3 t

H1: P h1
rho1: rho
H2: trace_model rho1 t_ctx
f3: futureCond
H3: bigstep h1 rho1 f_ctx e h2 (rho1 ++ rho3) f3 v
H5: bigstep h1 nil (fc_singleton trace_default) e h2
  rho3 f0 v
H6: futureCondEntail f f0
H8: futureCondEntail f3 f0
H9: futureSubtraction_linear f_ctx rho3 f_ctx'
H12: f3 = fc_conj f_ctx' f0
futureCondEntail (fc_conj f_ctx' f) f3

  
P: hprop
Q: val -> hprop
t: theta
f, f_ctx: futureCond
t_ctx: theta
f_ctx': futureCond
e: expr
H: forward P emp (fc_singleton trace_default) e Q t f
H0: futureSubtraction f_ctx t f_ctx'
v: val
h2: heap
rho3: rho
f0: futureCond
H7: Q v h2
H10: trace_model rho3 t
H11: futureCondEntail f f0
h1: heap
H1: P h1
rho1: rho
H2: trace_model rho1 t_ctx
H3: bigstep h1 rho1 f_ctx e h2 
  (rho1 ++ rho3) (fc_conj f_ctx' f0) v
H5: bigstep h1 nil (fc_singleton trace_default) e h2
  rho3 f0 v
H6: futureCondEntail f f0
H8: futureCondEntail (fc_conj f_ctx' f0) f0
H9: futureSubtraction_linear f_ctx rho3 f_ctx'
futureCondEntail (fc_conj f_ctx' f)
  (fc_conj f_ctx' f0)
   
  
P: hprop
Q: val -> hprop
t: theta
f, f_ctx: futureCond
t_ctx: theta
f_ctx': futureCond
e: expr
H: forward P emp (fc_singleton trace_default) e Q t f
H0: futureSubtraction f_ctx t f_ctx'
v: val
h2: heap
rho3: rho
f0: futureCond
H7: Q v h2
H10: trace_model rho3 t
H11: futureCondEntail f f0
h1: heap
H1: P h1
rho1: rho
H2: trace_model rho1 t_ctx
H3: bigstep h1 rho1 f_ctx e h2 
  (rho1 ++ rho3) (fc_conj f_ctx' f0) v
H5: bigstep h1 nil (fc_singleton trace_default) e h2
  rho3 f0 v
H6: futureCondEntail f f0
H8: futureCondEntail (fc_conj f_ctx' f0) f0
H9: futureSubtraction_linear f_ctx rho3 f_ctx'
H4: forall f1 f2 f3 f4 : futureCond,
futureCondEntail f1 f2 ->
futureCondEntail f3 f4 ->
futureCondEntail (fc_conj f1 f3) (fc_conj f2 f4)
futureCondEntail (fc_conj f_ctx' f)
  (fc_conj f_ctx' f0)

P: hprop
Q: val -> hprop
t: theta
f, f_ctx: futureCond
t_ctx: theta
f_ctx': futureCond
e: expr
H: forward P emp (fc_singleton trace_default) e Q t f
H0: futureSubtraction f_ctx t f_ctx'
v: val
h2: heap
rho3: rho
f0: futureCond
H7: Q v h2
H10: trace_model rho3 t
H11: futureCondEntail f f0
h1: heap
H1: P h1
rho1: rho
H2: trace_model rho1 t_ctx
H3: bigstep h1 rho1 f_ctx e h2 
  (rho1 ++ rho3) (fc_conj f_ctx' f0) v
H5: bigstep h1 nil (fc_singleton trace_default) e h2
  rho3 f0 v
H6: futureCondEntail f f0
H8: futureCondEntail (fc_conj f_ctx' f0) f0
H9: futureSubtraction_linear f_ctx rho3 f_ctx'
H4: futureCondEntail f_ctx' f_ctx' ->
futureCondEntail f f0 ->
futureCondEntail (fc_conj f_ctx' f)
  (fc_conj f_ctx' f0)
futureCondEntail f f0

  exact H11. 
Qed.
